releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Move to dayjs by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/74
* fix reference to local state warning by svelte by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/75
* Make updating a habit entry snappier. Filter entries by date beforehand. by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/83
* Lots of updates to dependencies


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/compare/1.1.8...1.1.9

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* add preview image and added displayName option to readme by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/23
* Refactors and error handling by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/24
* Refactor separate repository from view by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/25
* using obsidian css variables when possible, helps with light theme lo… by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/30
* listen to file events only after layout ready by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/31
* added llm txt file. Made noHabits variable reactive by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/32


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/compare/0.2.3...1.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* added vitest and fixed some inconsistent exports by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/15
* Add fisher for factory bot like fun for testing by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/16
* move factories to their own folders, not inside models by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/17
* added vitest coverage and coverage ui by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/18
* made the readme look nice, added a link to grab me a coffee by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/19
* prevent reading from all files in the vault, added a guard clause to … by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/20
* add display name option setting by @nazoadiego in https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/pull/21


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nazoadiego/tiny-habits/compare/0.2.1...0.2.2
